heading: Sense of Congress regarding construction of fencing near San Diego, California
label: 256 Sense of Congress regarding construction of fencing near San Diego, California
text: It is the sense of the Congress that completing the 14-mile border fence project required to be carried out under section 102(b) of the Illegal Immigration Reform and Immigrant Responsibility Act of 1996 ( note) should be a priority for the Secretary.8 U.S.C. 1103
notes: References in TextSection 102(b) of the Illegal Immigration Reform and Immigrant Responsibility Act of 1996, referred to in text, is , which is set out as a note under , Aliens and Nationality.section 102(b) of title I of div. C of Pub. L. 104–208section 1103 of Title 8
